findings.title: OWASP Top 10 baseline
findings.detail: No critical or high findings across OWASP-aligned controls.
No critical or high npm advisories.
findings.title: Dependency audit

findings.detail: No secret patterns in client bundles and cron secret is not query-based.
findings.title: Secrets scan

findings.detail: RLS not fully configured in migrations — member routes rely on server-side JWT enforcement.
findings.title: RLS verification

findings.detail: Member auth verifies Supabase bearer JWT and rejects body identity mismatch.
findings.title: JWT validation

findings.detail: IP rate limits, PIN/payment throttles, and retention scheduler wired.
findings.title: Rate limiting

findings.detail: Sessions use bearer tokens; login does not accept session IDs from query strings.
findings.title: Session fixation

findings.detail: Admin cron secret is header-only; security dashboards RBAC-enforced.
findings.title: Broken access control

findings.detail: Public member data actions whitelisted; protected actions require auth with identity mismatch checks.
findings.title: IDOR scan

findings.detail: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML in src; security headers middleware configured.
findings.title: XSS scan

findings.detail: State-changing member APIs use Authorization bearer tokens (not cookie-only session).
findings.title: CSRF scan

findings.detail: Photo upload-first moderation and contact-leak scanning active.
findings.title: Upload validation

findings.detail: Paystack webhooks verify HMAC signature on raw body.
findings.title: Webhook validation

findings.detail: Signup OTP enforces attempt limits, expiry, and protection tests exist.
findings.title: OTP abuse

findings.detail: Payment initialize throttling and abuse monitors configured.
findings.title: Payment abuse

recommendations.title: Maintain security baseline
recommendations.detail: Re-run npm run certify:security before each release candidate.
